data.title: Compressed Set Representations based on Set Difference
data.authors: Travis Gagie, Meng He, Gonzalo Navarro
data.description: We introduce a compressed representation of sets of sets that exploits how much they differ from each other. Our representation supports access, membership, predecessor and successor queries on the sets within logarithmic time. In addition, we give a new MST-based construction algorithm for the representation that outperforms standard ones.
